name: Sauteed Firm Tofu
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the firm tofu crosswise into pieces resembling French-fried potatoes.
2. Heat a wok, coat with oil, and sprinkle with salt.
3. Add onions to the hot wok and stir fry for about 30 seconds over high heat.
4. Reduce the heat to medium-low. Add mushrooms and stir fry for about 1 minute.
5. Add carrots and green peppers in that order, sautéing each for about 1 minute.
6. Lower the heat to low. Stir in sake, soy sauce, ginger, sugar, and water. Simmer for 3 to 4 minutes.
7. Stir in cornstarch dissolved in water (3 tbsp). Simmer for an additional 30 seconds.
